project.name: myagent
project.description: A lightweight general-purpose AI agent framework in Python, designed for interview preparation with a clean plugin-based architecture.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package initialization file for the agent module, exporting public types and components.

nodes.name: llm.py
nodes.summary: Defines the LLM Protocol and associated data types (ToolCallDelta, LLMResponse) for the agent framework's LLM interface.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses @runtime_checkable decorator for structural typing of the LLM Protocol.

nodes.name: loop.py
nodes.summary: Main AgentLoop orchestrator class that runs the agent cycle: messages to LLM to tool_calls to execution and back.
nodes.languageNotes: Delegates to plugins (ToolRegistry, HookManager, MemoryManager, SubAgentManager) rather than containing logic directly.

nodes.name: message.py
nodes.summary: Message data model with Role/Content/ToolCall support, plus helper constructors for tool results and system messages.

nodes.name: result.py
nodes.summary: Result data classes (StopReason, ToolCallMade, RunResult) capturing agent execution outcomes and tool call tracking.

nodes.name: openai_llm.py
nodes.summary: OpenAI Chat Completions API implementation of the LLM Protocol, using httpx AsyncClient for HTTP requests.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements the LLM Protocol; uses httpx for async HTTP; handles streaming tool_call deltas.

nodes.name: anthropic_llm.py
nodes.summary: Anthropic Messages API implementation of the LLM Protocol, converting between OpenAI-style message format and Anthropic's content blocks.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements the LLM Protocol; converts OpenAI tool format to Anthropic tool use blocks; includes Unicode surrogate stripping.

nodes.name: cli.py
nodes.summary: Command-line interface entry point using Typer, providing build_llm, build_agent, and run modes (single prompt and interactive).
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Typer for CLI argument parsing; supports both OpenAI and Anthropic LLM providers.

nodes.name: AgentLoop
nodes.summary: Main orchestrator class that coordinates LLM calls, tool execution, hooks, and memory management in an iterative agent cycle.

nodes.name: Message
nodes.summary: Message data class with role, content, tool_call_id, and tool_calls fields, plus serialization via to_dict and from_dict.

nodes.name: OpenAILLM
nodes.summary: OpenAI LLM implementation using httpx AsyncClient, implementing chat method that returns LLMResponse with tool calls.

nodes.name: AnthropicLLM
nodes.summary: Anthropic LLM implementation using httpx AsyncClient, converting between OpenAI-style API and Anthropic messages format.

nodes.name: build_llm
nodes.summary: Factory function that constructs an LLM instance based on provider (anthropic or openai) and model name, reading API keys from environment.

nodes.name: build_agent
nodes.summary: Builds a complete AgentLoop instance with ToolRegistry, HookManager (LoggingHook, TracingHook), and MemoryManager wired up.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point using Typer decorators for arguments (prompt, model, provider, max_iterations, system, interactive), dispatching to run_interactive or run_single.

nodes.name: run_single
nodes.summary: Executes a single prompt through the agent, building messages with system_message, running agent.run, and outputting the result.

nodes.name: run_interactive
nodes.summary: Interactive REPL loop that repeatedly prompts user, builds messages, runs agent, and displays results until user types 'quit'.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Tool subsystem entry point providing get_default_tools() factory that assembles the default tool set (Read, Write, Bash, Grep, WebSearch, WebFetch).

nodes.name: base.py
nodes.summary: Defines the Tool abstract base class (ABC with name, description, parameters, read_only, dangerous properties) and ToolCall data class for representing tool call requests from the LLM.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses @runtime_checkable Protocol pattern; tool_parameters decorator attaches JSONSchema metadata to Tool subclasses.

nodes.name: registry.py
nodes.summary: ToolRegistry manages dynamic tool registration and execution, providing methods to register tools, retrieve schemas, get sandbox executor, and execute tool calls by name.

nodes.name: sandbox.py
nodes.summary: SandboxExecutor provides subprocess isolation for dangerous tool execution, with async run() and sync run_sync() methods that enforce timeout and capture stdout/stderr.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses asyncio.create_subprocess_shell with timeout enforcement for sandboxed command execution.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty init file marking the builtin tools package.

nodes.name: bash.py
nodes.summary: BashTool wraps Shell commands for execution via SandboxExecutor, used for running user-provided shell scripts with timeout and output capture.

nodes.name: grep.py
nodes.summary: GrepTool searches for regex patterns in files using Python pathlib and re modules, supporting recursive directory traversal and returning matched lines with context.

nodes.name: read.py
nodes.summary: ReadTool reads file contents from the filesystem using pathlib.Path, returning file contents as text with line count metadata.

nodes.name: web_fetch.py
nodes.summary: WebFetchTool retrieves web page content via HTTP GET using httpx AsyncClient, returning response text with length metadata.

nodes.name: web_search.py
nodes.summary: WebSearchTool performs basic web search by fetching a search endpoint and filtering results by query keywords, returning matching lines.

nodes.name: write.py
nodes.summary: WriteTool writes content to files using pathlib.Path, automatically creating parent directories as needed and returning bytes written.

nodes.name: get_default_tools
nodes.summary: Factory function that instantiates and returns a list of all default built-in tools: ReadTool, WriteTool, BashTool, WebSearchTool, WebFetchTool, GrepTool.

nodes.name: tool_parameters
nodes.summary: Decorator that attaches name, description, and JSONSchema parameters to a Tool subclass, used to define the LLM-facing interface for each tool.

nodes.name: Tool
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for all agent tools. Subclasses must implement execute() and get_schema(). Has properties: name, description, parameters, read_only, dangerous.

nodes.name: ToolCall
nodes.summary: Data class representing a tool call request from the LLM, containing id, name, and arguments. Includes classmethod from_delta for incremental parsing.

nodes.name: ToolRegistry
nodes.summary: Central registry for tool management. Provides register(), get_schema(), get_all_schemas(), get_sandbox(), execute(), and get_tool() methods for dynamic tool lifecycle management.

nodes.name: SandboxExecutor
nodes.summary: Provides sandboxed subprocess execution for dangerous tools. run() is async using asyncio.create_subprocess_shell with timeout; run_sync() is a synchronous wrapper around subprocess.run.

nodes.name: GrepTool
nodes.summary: File search tool using regex pattern matching via Python re module, supports recursive directory traversal and returns matched lines with filename and line number context.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the public hooks API: Hook protocol and HookManager orchestrator.

nodes.name: manager.py
nodes.summary: Core hooks plugin defining the Hook Protocol for lifecycle extension and HookManager as the orchestrator that delegates to registered hooks.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting all builtin hook implementations: LoggingHook, TracingHook, RetryHook, and TokenBudgetHook.

nodes.name: logging.py
nodes.summary: LoggingHook implementation that logs lifecycle events (iteration start/end, LLM calls, tool execution, errors) via the standard logging module.

nodes.name: retry.py
nodes.summary: RetryHook implementation providing exponential-backoff retry logic for failed tool executions, with configurable max retries and base delay.

nodes.name: token_budget.py
nodes.summary: TokenBudgetHook implementation that estimates token usage per tool result and emits warnings when approaching the configured budget threshold.

nodes.name: tracing.py
nodes.summary: TracingHook and ToolCallTrace dataclass for recording tool execution timing, success/failure status, and aggregated summary statistics.

nodes.name: Hook
nodes.summary: Runtime-checkable Protocol defining six async lifecycle methods: before_iteration, after_llm_call, before_tool_execute, after_tool_execute, on_error, and on_completion.

nodes.name: HookManager
nodes.summary: Orchestrator class holding a list of Hook implementations and delegating each lifecycle event to all registered hooks in sequence.

nodes.name: LoggingHook
nodes.summary: Builtin hook that logs each lifecycle event using the myagent.hooks.logging logger, with optional verbose mode for LLM response details.

nodes.name: RetryHook
nodes.summary: Builtin hook that wraps tool execution with exponential-backoff retry logic, logging warnings on each retry attempt and returning an error message after exhausting retries.

nodes.name: execute_with_retry
nodes.summary: Executes a tool call function with exponential-backoff retries up to max_retries times, sleeping with doubling delay between attempts.

nodes.name: TokenBudgetHook
nodes.summary: Builtin hook that estimates token consumption from tool results and warns when usage exceeds the configured budget threshold.

nodes.name: ToolCallTrace
nodes.summary: Dataclass recording a single tool call's name, arguments, duration in milliseconds, and success flag.

nodes.name: TracingHook
nodes.summary: Builtin hook that instruments tool execution using time.perf_counter to record duration and success for each call, providing an aggregated summary via get_summary.

nodes.name: get_summary
nodes.summary: Computes aggregated tracing statistics: total calls, successful/failed counts, and average duration in milliseconds.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init file for agent.memory module, currently empty.

nodes.name: manager.py
nodes.summary: MemoryManager plugin handling session message history and AutoCompact token compression. Manages message addition, token counting, and LLM-based compaction when limits are exceeded.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses tiktoken encoder for token counting; AutoCompact preserves system and recent messages while compressing middle via LLM.

nodes.name: MemoryManager
nodes.summary: Plugin managing session message history with AutoCompact token compression. Tracks messages, counts tokens using tiktoken, and compresses history when exceeding the max limit.

nodes.name: compact
nodes.summary: Performs LLM-based message compression when token limit is exceeded. Preserves system and recent messages, compresses middle section via LLM summarization, logs before/after counts.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init file for agent.skills module, currently empty.

nodes.name: loader.py
nodes.summary: SkillLoader plugin for loading markdown skill files with YAML frontmatter. Parses skill definitions (name, description, prompt, tools, always) and provides matching against user queries.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses regex FRONTMATTER_RE pattern to parse YAML frontmatter from markdown files.

nodes.name: Skill
nodes.summary: Simple data class holding skill metadata: name, description, prompt body, tools list, and always flag.

nodes.name: SkillLoader
nodes.summary: Plugin for discovering and loading markdown-based skill files from a directory. Parses YAML frontmatter, builds Skill objects, and matches skills against queries.

nodes.name: load
nodes.summary: Discovers all .md files in the skills directory using glob, parses each via _parse_skill_md, and returns a list of Skill objects.

nodes.name: _parse_skill_md
nodes.summary: Parses a single markdown skill file by extracting YAML frontmatter via regex, then extracting name, description, tools, always, and prompt body fields.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init file for agent.subagent module, currently empty.

nodes.name: manager.py
nodes.summary: SubAgentManager plugin for background task delegation. Creates asyncio tasks for subagents, maintains channels for parent-subagent communication, and provides cancellation support.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses asyncio.create_task for background delegation; SubAgentResult and ParentChannel come from protocol.py.

nodes.name: SubAgentManager
nodes.summary: Plugin managing background task delegation via asyncio. Creates SubAgentManager instances with UUID, maintains channel registry, and runs the LLM chat loop for each subagent task.

nodes.name: parent_channel_hook.py
nodes.summary: ParentChannelHook implementing all hook points (before_iteration, before_tool_execute, after_tool_execute, after_llm_call, on_error, on_completion) to inject subagent results mid-turn via ParentChannel.

nodes.name: ParentChannelHook
nodes.summary: Hook implementation that bridges parent and subagent execution. Injects subagent results mid-turn through the ParentChannel and appends results to parent messages.

nodes.name: protocol.py
nodes.summary: Protocol definitions for subagent system: SubAgentResult dataclass holding subagent outputs, and ParentChannel async queue for parent-subagent communication.

nodes.name: SubAgentResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding subagent execution results: subagent_id, task description, result value, and tool_call_id for correlation.

nodes.name: ParentChannel
nodes.summary: Async queue-based channel for parent-subagent communication. Allows putting results and getting them with optional timeout for non-blocking retrieval.

nodes.name: test_loop.py
nodes.summary: Tests for AgentLoop core orchestration: verifies content return, assistant message appending before tool results, and max iteration behavior.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains EchoTool and MockLLM test helpers; MockLLM has 2 methods and qualifies as a significant class node.

nodes.name: test_openai_llm.py
nodes.summary: Tests for OpenAILLM: verifies successful chat completion and tool call handling via mocked HTTP responses.

nodes.name: test_anthropic_llm.py
nodes.summary: Tests for AnthropicLLM: covers sync/async JSON responses, surrogate character handling in user messages and response text, and tool use block conversion.

nodes.name: test_message.py
nodes.summary: Tests for Message dataclass: verifies creation, tool attachment, and serialization/deserialization with and without tool calls.

nodes.name: test_result.py
nodes.summary: Tests for RunResult: verifies result creation, stop reason values, and ToolCallMade tracking.

nodes.name: test_llm.py
nodes.summary: Tests for LLMResponse: verifies response creation with content, tool calls, and no-content cases.

nodes.name: test_logging_tracing.py
nodes.summary: Tests for LoggingHook and TracingHook: verifies hooks do not crash on before_iteration and that TracingHook records tool execution.

nodes.name: test_manager.py
nodes.summary: Tests for HookManager: verifies all hooks are called in sequence and that empty manager handles gracefully.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains MockHook helper class with 6 methods implementing the Hook protocol.

nodes.name: test_retry_budget.py
nodes.summary: Tests for RetryHook and TokenBudgetHook: verifies retry behavior on tool failure and budget hook initialization.

nodes.name: test_memory.py
nodes.summary: Tests for MemoryManager: verifies message addition, token counting, and AutoCompact trigger logic.

nodes.name: test_loader.py
nodes.summary: Tests for SkillLoader: verifies YAML frontmatter parsing, system prompt extraction, and directory-based skill loading.

nodes.name: test_protocol.py
nodes.summary: Tests for ParentChannel: verifies put/get result semantics and timeout behavior.

nodes.name: test_subagent_manager.py
nodes.summary: Tests for SubAgentManager: verifies delegation returns subagent ID, listing, and cancellation.

nodes.name: test_base.py
nodes.summary: Tests for tool base: verifies @tool_parameters decorator attaches metadata correctly and read_only flag is set.

nodes.name: test_read_write_tools.py
nodes.summary: Tests for ReadTool and WriteTool: verifies file read, missing file error, and write operations.

nodes.name: test_registry.py
nodes.summary: Tests for ToolRegistry: verifies tool registration, schema retrieval, sandbox flag, and execute with not-found handling.

nodes.name: test_sandbox.py
nodes.summary: Tests for SandboxExecutor: verifies simple command execution, timeout handling, and error propagation on failure.

nodes.name: MockLLM
nodes.summary: Mock LLM implementation for testing AgentLoop: returns configurable LLMResponse with optional tool call deltas.

nodes.name: MockHook
nodes.summary: Mock hook implementation for testing HookManager: implements all Hook protocol methods with call tracking.

nodes.name: test_agent_loop_appends_assistant_message_before_tool_result
nodes.summary: Tests that AgentLoop appends assistant message with tool calls before waiting for tool execution results.

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment variable template defining API keys and base URLs for OpenAI and Anthropic LLM providers.

nodes.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
nodes.summary: OpenAI API key for LLM requests.

nodes.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
nodes.summary: Anthropic API key for Claude LLM requests.

nodes.name: OPENAI_BASE_URL
nodes.summary: OpenAI API base URL for custom endpoint routing.

nodes.name: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL
nodes.summary: Anthropic API base URL for custom endpoint routing.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Python project configuration defining dependencies, build system, and pytest/hatch tool settings.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Main project documentation covering features, quick start guide, built-in tools, project structure, architecture design, extension guides, and tech stack.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Claude Code guidance file documenting project overview, commands, architecture with five plugin systems, and regression testing rules.

nodes.name: code-review.md
nodes.summary: Skill file defining the code review capability for the agent framework.

nodes.name: research.md
nodes.summary: Skill file defining the research capability for the agent framework.

nodes.name: resume-description.md
nodes.summary: Resume project description with recommended writing styles, core architecture explanation, technical highlights, and example resume entries.

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-general-purpose-agent-design.md
nodes.summary: Architecture design specification covering core agent loop, tool system with registry and sandbox, hook system, memory system with AutoCompact, skill system, subagent system, and project structure.

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-reference-projects-analysis.md
nodes.summary: Analysis of reference projects (nanobot, hermes-agent, claude-code-haha, openclaw) covering core loop patterns, tool systems, memory systems, multi-agent patterns, hook/lifecycle patterns, and skill systems.

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-01-project-scaffolding.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for project scaffolding covering directory structure, pyproject.toml, .gitignore, and README.md.

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-02-base-types.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for base type definitions covering Message, ToolCall, and LLMResponse types.

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-03-llm-abstraction.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for LLM interface abstraction covering LLM Protocol and OpenAI LLM implementation.

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-04-tool-system.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the tool system covering Tool ABC, ToolRegistry, SandboxExecutor, and built-in tools (Read, Write, Bash, WebSearch, WebFetch, Grep).

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-05-hook-system.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the hook system covering HookManager, Hook Protocol, LoggingHook, TracingHook, TokenBudgetHook, and RetryHook.

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-06-memory-system.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the memory system covering MemoryManager and AutoCompact token compression.

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-07-skill-system.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the skill system covering SkillLoader and example skill files.

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-08-subagent-system.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the subagent system covering parent-child communication via asyncio.Queue, SubAgentManager, ParentChannelHook, and mid-turn injection.

nodes.name: 2026-05-06-09-agent-loop.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for AgentLoop core and CLI entry point covering the main agent cycle, CLI interface, and public API exposure.

layers.name: Core Layer
layers.description: AgentLoop orchestration, base protocols, and shared data types.

layers.name: LLM Providers
layers.description: Concrete LLM implementations for OpenAI and Anthropic APIs.

layers.name: Tool Plugin System
layers.description: Dynamic tool registration, sandboxed execution, and builtin tools.

layers.name: Hook Plugin System
layers.description: Lifecycle extension points and builtin hooks.

layers.name: Memory Plugin
layers.description: Session message history with AutoCompact token compression.

layers.name: Skill Plugin System
layers.description: Markdown skill file loading with on-demand and always-loaded skills.

layers.name: SubAgent Plugin System
layers.description: Background task delegation with ParentChannel for mid-turn injection.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Project configuration, dependencies, and build settings.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation including README, design specs, and planning documents.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Comprehensive test suite covering all agent subsystems.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand the project's purpose and architecture.

tour.title: CLI Entry Point
tour.description: The CLI entry point bootstraps the agent by initializing all plugin systems.

tour.title: AgentLoop Core
tour.description: The AgentLoop is the single orchestrator that holds references to all plugins.

tour.title: Core Types
tour.description: The foundational types define the domain model: LLM Protocol, Message dataclass, RunResult and StopReason.

tour.title: LLM Providers
tour.description: OpenAILLM and AnthropicLLM implement the LLM Protocol, allowing the AgentLoop to remain provider-agnostic.

tour.title: Tool Registry and Base
tour.description: ToolRegistry manages dynamic tool registration. Tool ABC with @tool_parameters decorator declares tool metadata.

tour.title: Builtin Tools
tour.description: Six builtin tools: Read, Write, Bash (sandboxed), WebSearch, WebFetch, Grep.

tour.title: Hook System
tour.description: HookManager provides six lifecycle extension points. Builtin hooks: Logging, Tracing, Retry, TokenBudget.

tour.title: Memory Manager
tour.description: MemoryManager handles session message history with AutoCompact token compression using LLM summarization.

tour.title: Skill Loader
tour.description: SkillLoader parses markdown skill files with YAML frontmatter and prompt body for on-demand capability extension.

tour.title: SubAgent System
tour.description: SubAgentManager handles asyncio background task delegation. ParentChannel enables mid-turn result injection.

tour.title: Architecture Spec
tour.description: The architecture design document traces the reasoning behind the plugin-based approach.

tour.title: Project Configuration
tour.description: pyproject.toml declares project dependencies, uv toolchain, and plugin module configuration.
